protocol.strict_mdd: includes in-position adverse excursion and period-contained forced exits
protocol.trading_target_asset: BTCUSDT/BTC only unless explicitly changed by user
protocol.feature_inputs: External explanatory variables are allowed if merged causally: DXY, kimchi, USDKRW, Upbit BTC, BTC derivatives, and optionally other-coin lead/lag. They do not imply changing the traded asset.
protocol.alpha_pool_threshold: Feature/gate discoveries are promoted into alpha_pool only when a combined strategy clears test2024 CAGR/strict_MDD >=2.5; live-grade standalone requires >=3.0.

feature_tiers.alpha_feature: Strictly promoted feature family: directly tied to strategy-level edge. Requires a combined strategy using this feature to clear test2024 CAGR/strict_MDD >= 2.5, or a standalone/live-grade strategy using it to clear >=3.0, with nontrivial trades and reproducible recipe.
feature_tiers.beta_feature: Potential alpha-feature pool: plausible edge remains, but current evidence has not met alpha-feature promotion threshold. Use for selector/gate/exit experiments with strict contamination notes.
feature_tiers.gamma_feature: Strict noise/failure pool: only for feature families where evidence strongly shows the attempted usage is noise/invalid/repeatedly non-causal. Gamma means avoid similar retries unless the recorded disqualifying evidence is overturned.

beta_to_alpha_feature: A reproducible strategy using the feature clears test2024 CAGR/strict_MDD >= 2.5 after 6bp/side, strict in-position MDD, split-end forced close.
Trade support is not trivial: normally test2024 >=20 trades and eval2025 >=15 trades, unless explicitly marked sparse low-frequency and manually accepted.
Eval2025 is not clearly broken: positive CAGR and no obvious MDD explosion; live-grade standalone requires CAGR/strict_MDD >=3.0.
Feature contribution is identifiable versus baseline/no-feature variant or portfolio marginal contribution.
generation_recipe and usage evidence are complete.
beta_to_gamma_feature: Requires strong evidence that the attempted feature family/usage is only noise, not merely below current alpha/live thresholds.

Acceptable evidence: repeated broad + targeted scans show no robust positive test/eval structure and no useful selector contribution; or leakage/no-op/causal invalidation; or consistent regime inversion/OOS collapse across independent variants.
Gamma entry must name the exact failed usage mode. If a different usage mode remains plausible, keep that feature family in beta and put only the failed search set/provenance in gamma.
Do not gamma-demote broad inventories or search sets just because they are not alpha features; they should be provenance unless they encode a failed/noisy usage mode.
Do not gamma-demote because live-grade is missing; beta is for remaining alpha-feature possibility.
gamma_to_beta_feature: Only allowed if new data, corrected methodology, or a materially different usage mode removes the recorded failure reason.
Must show at least one reproducible combined strategy with test2024 CAGR/strict_MDD >=1.5 and positive eval2025, or strong portfolio-selector contribution before alpha threshold.

entries.name: All alpha-research feature inventory

auditing whether a proposed feature family was already tried

entries.name: Long range/compression/funding/momentum breakout feature set (2026-07-10)
entries.description: Feature family behind the new long-regime union alpha: range expansion breakouts, compression breakouts, HTF momentum/range-position confirmation, low-funding trend squeeze, and weak-USDKRW macro relief.
data_sources: USDKRW/DXY-derived macro fields already merged in market cache
usable_for: live regime-specific risk-on breakout sleeve research

Macro/momentum-only variants improve trade count but often fall below CAGR/MDD >= 3 on eval windows.
entries.evidence: Union validation shows combo_A clears CAGR/strict_MDD >= 3 on 2024 test, 2025 eval, and 2026H1 with 146 combined trades; combo_B/D are cleaner low-MDD range/compression variants but sparse in 2026H1.
entries.leakage_notes: Component thresholds are train-window quantiles from train<2024, but union composition was selected after inspecting 2024~2026H1 discovery results. Treat as strong candidate requiring predeclared rolling validation before live sizing.
entries.tier_rationale: Alpha feature: the explicit feature family supports multiple combined strategies above test2024 CAGR/MDD 2.5 and a live-grade candidate above 3.0 on test/eval/YTD, with nontrivial trade counts for combo_A.
entries.next_action: Run predeclared rolling validation and then convert the best union candidate into a live config only if the ratio remains above 3 with sufficient trades.

generation_recipe.protocol: train<2024 component thresholds; test=2024; eval=2025; ytd2026=2026-01-01..2026-06-02; 0.5x leverage; 6bp round-trip assumption via fee/slippage params; strict OHLC MDD; CAGR over full calendar window including idle time
generation_recipe.notes: Use as LLM state tokens describing market structure, not as raw numeric dumping only. Keep component identities explicit so RLLM can reason over setup type.

entries.name: Bear-regime REX short feature/state set (2026-07-10)
entries.description: State/features used by the REX/LLM dual-regime short candidate. It is intended for manually declared persistent bearish regimes, not universal market use.
data_sources: REX rolling extrema / higher-timeframe price action features
Binance funding/premium context where included by source records
USDKRW stress context in dual-regime export
feature_examples: higher-timeframe pullback/reclaim tokens interpreted inversely for short
usable_for: RLLM textual state for downside continuation / failed reclaim setups
manual-regime live pilot with SHORT-only allowed signals
known_failures: Fast hand-built rule scan over downside momentum/range breakdown/funding/macro did not find a universal short alpha: best 2024~2026H1 ratio only 1.12.
The exported REX short signal is weak/negative in 2024 when treated as all-market/universal; use requires bearish regime gating.
entries.evidence: REX short predictions for 2025~2026H1 produce bear_combined return +19.91%, CAGR 13.69%, strict MDD 3.72%, ratio 3.68, 49 trades. 2025 ratio 5.57 and 2026H1 ratio 3.39, but all-2024~2026H1 ratio falls to 2.10 because 2024 is not treated as the target bear regime.
entries.leakage_notes: The 2025~2026H1 prediction file is an exported prior candidate, not newly fit here. Treat as candidate-grade until regenerated by a documented train-only pipeline and tested on fresh future bearish regime data.
entries.tier_rationale: Alpha feature for bear-regime use: clears target ratio inside intended bearish regime, while universal short scans failed. Promotion is conditional on explicit regime gate.
entries.next_action: Regenerate REX short predictions from train-only artifacts where possible, then run rolling/month-block validation and live dry-run with require_bear_regime=true.

generation_recipe.protocol: manual bear regime; SHORT TRADE predictions only; fixed 144-bar hold from prediction export; 0.5x validation leverage; full calendar CAGR; strict short MDD uses intrabar highs

macro risk-off state token for RLLM

entries.evidence: TP/SL refine found non-REX FX-stress short candidates. Conservative q0.20 version: test2024 +13.07% return, CAGR/MDD 2.59; eval2025 +14.52%, ratio 4.75; ytd2026 +9.01%, ratio 6.67; bear_combined +24.83%, CAGR 16.96%, strict MDD 5.16%, ratio 3.29, 56 trades.
entries.leakage_notes: Gate thresholds came from earlier train-quantile short-base scan artifacts, but TP/SL/variant selection inspected 2025/2026 bear windows. Candidate-grade until predeclared rolling validation or fresh future bear data.
entries.tier_rationale: Alpha feature for bear-regime use: non-REX q0.20 FX stress candidate clears CAGR/strict_MDD >=3 on 2025~2026H1 bear window and remains positive in 2024, though 2024 ratio is below live-grade threshold.
entries.next_action: Run rolling/month-block validation and compare marginal contribution versus REX short; if stable, create a separate live config with explicit bear-regime gate.

portfolio diversifier versus FX-stress and REX shorts

entries.tier_rationale: Alpha feature for bear-regime use: clears bear_combined CAGR/strict_MDD >=3 with 127 trades and remains positive in test/eval/ytd.
entries.next_action: Compare marginal contribution against FX-stress and REX shorts; run predeclared rolling validation.

entries.leakage_notes: Feature selected from OOS refine table and 2024 is weak. Use as beta selector only.
entries.tier_rationale: Beta feature: plausible independent price-action idea, but insufficient 2024 robustness for alpha_pool promotion.
entries.next_action: Test as a filter/selector layered on stronger bear shorts, not standalone.

entries.name: Non-REX kimchi unwind short feature set (2026-07-10)
entries.description: Potential short feature family: BTC is weak on 3-day HTF return while kimchi premium change sharply falls. Interpreted as Korea-side risk appetite unwind / local premium compression during bearish regimes.
data_sources: Kimchi premium change from BTCKRW/USDKRW/BTCUSDT external cache
usable_for: portfolio diversifier research versus FX-stress and premium-discount shorts
known_failures: Bear combined ratio is below live-grade threshold 3.0 (best 2.87).
2026H1 is strong but eval2025 ratio is only 1.92-2.23 depending hold.
entries.evidence: Best scan result: test2024 +7.64%, ratio 1.27, 40 trades; eval2025 +8.41%, ratio 1.92, 32 trades; ytd2026 +9.10%, ratio 6.15, 16 trades; bear_combined +18.28%, CAGR 12.59%, strict MDD 4.39%, ratio 2.87, 48 trades. Later selector overlay promoted premium+kimchi union: 2025~2026H1 bear return +37.16%, CAGR/MDD 3.90, 135 trades.
entries.leakage_notes: Feature selected after inspecting bear-window scan; keep beta until rolling validation or combination improves ratio above 3 without sacrificing 2024.
entries.tier_rationale: Alpha component feature: standalone kimchi unwind did not clear ratio>=3, but premium+kimchi union was promoted as bear-regime alpha and kimchi provided useful coverage expansion while keeping 2024 positive.
entries.next_action: Use as alpha component/coverage extender with premium-discount short, not as standalone entry unless future validation improves.

entries.name: Long derivatives squeeze union feature set (2026-07-10)
entries.description: Feature family behind the newly found long squeeze unions: upper range breakout, low-funding positive trend, negative premium change with HTF momentum, and compression breakout.
known_failures: Component union was selected after inspecting 2024~2026H1 scan output, so it is not final clean unseen proof.
Sparse variants with ytd2026 trades below 10 should not be promoted despite high ratios.
entries.evidence: long_component_tp_union_scan rerun found multiple unions clearing CAGR/strict_MDD >=3 on 2024 test, 2025 eval, 2026 YTD, and combined 2024~2026H1. The strongest robust candidates were range_bb90+funding10_trend70+premium20_mom90 and funding10_trend70+compress05_trend80+premium20_mom90.
entries.leakage_notes: Thresholds are fixed from prior train-window quantile discovery; scan excludes rows after 2026-06-02 before feature build; CAGR uses full calendar windows and strict MDD includes intrabar adverse excursion.
entries.tier_rationale: Alpha feature: it supports at least two long candidate unions above CAGR/strict_MDD 3 on test/eval/YTD with combined trade counts of 92 and 118 respectively.
entries.next_action: Run rolling/month-block validation and live-sim conversion without reselecting component unions.

generation_recipe.protocol: fixed component thresholds; test2024/eval2025/ytd2026/combined windows; 0.5x leverage; fee=4bp and slippage=1bp per side; full-window CAGR; strict OHLC MDD

entries.name: OI/flow state-transition features (2026-07-12)
entries.description: Past-only OI impulse, taker-flow acceleration, directional efficiency, volatility release and wick/flow divergence features tested as standalone BTC long entries under fixed bullish regimes.
known_failures: 6,950 eligible variants produced zero candidates with CAGR/strict MDD >=2.5 on both test2024 and eval2025
top 2024 OI-squeeze variants collapsed in eval2025
best test/eval-min candidate failed ytd2026 with ratio -1.93
entries.evidence: Standalone scan with train-only thresholds, test-only ranking, 6bp/side and strict MDD found no alpha-pool qualifier. Best test/eval minimum ratio was 1.78 on eval and failed 2026.
entries.leakage_notes: Formulas/regimes were predeclared; thresholds fit on train; top candidates selected on 2024 only. 2025 and 2026 are now consumed for this family.
entries.tier_rationale: Beta, not gamma: several OI-flow confirmation variants remained positive in eval2025, so noise-only evidence is insufficient; not alpha because no candidate cleared the 2.5 test+eval rule.
entries.next_action: Do not retune thresholds. Revisit only with a materially different mechanism such as event-time normalization or independent path-dependent exit.

generation_recipe.protocol: train<2024 thresholds; test2024 selection; sealed eval2025/ytd2026; 6bp/side; strict MDD; full-window CAGR

entries.name: Funding/premium trend squeeze alpha features (2026-07-12)
entries.description: Minimal feature subset behind the long_minimal_funding_premium alpha: combine derivatives crowding/compression with already-confirmed price momentum rather than raw numeric-only prompts.
known_failures: Standalone train 2020-2023 ratio is only 1.60 with strict MDD 15.32%, so this is not independently live-grade.
Threshold provenance is not fully clean unseen in this turn; keep contamination_risk medium until original scan provenance is re-audited.
entries.evidence: As a fixed long candidate, the feature pair cleared ratio >3 on test 2024, eval 2025, ytd 2026, and combined 2024-2026H1, but failed target ratio on train 2020-2023.
entries.leakage_notes: Causal construction depends on preprocessing/binance_aux_features.py backward-asof joins and preprocessing/market_features.py past-only returns/completed-HTF joins. Live code must reject stale/unavailable funding/premium rows rather than silently relying on default zeros or future estimate fields.
entries.tier_rationale: Alpha feature: the features directly define a candidate trading rule and are suitable as discrete RLLM setup tokens.
entries.next_action: Add availability/staleness assertions in live feature builder and evaluate month-block/rolling stability before promotion.

generation_recipe.protocol: Past-only feature construction; full-window CAGR; strict OHLC MDD; non-overlapping long events with hold 576 and stride 12.
generation_recipe.notes: Prefer text tokens LOW_FUNDING_UPTREND and PREMIUM_COMPRESSION_DAILY_MOMENTUM for LLM/RLLM rather than unstructured floats.

entries.name: Raw Donchian channel + ATR trailing (2026-07-12)
entries.description: Raw shifted Donchian breakout-cross entries with path-dependent ATR/opposite-channel exits and no required holding period.
known_failures: All 144 corrected variants failed to produce a profitable test2024 row at 6bp/side
zero test/eval ratio>=2.5 qualifiers
least-bad test row lost in test, eval and 2026
entries.evidence: Full corrected event-driven scan was uniformly uneconomic; invalid repeated-entry and same-bar-trail runs were explicitly discarded.
entries.leakage_notes: Deterministic shifted indicators; selection on test2024 only; eval2025/2026 reporting after selection.
entries.tier_rationale: Gamma: broad corrected grid is uniformly negative, providing strong noise/cost-dominated evidence for this exact standalone mechanism.
entries.next_action: Do not retry raw 5m Donchian+ATR threshold grids. Only revisit with a materially different event such as trend-pullback recovery or slower execution horizon.

generation_recipe.protocol: cross events only; shifted channels/ATR; 6bp/side; strict intrabar MDD; test-only selection

entries.name: Low-correlation Alpha101/orderflow primitive feature family (2026-07-12)
entries.description: Alpha101-style intraday price/volume/VWAP/correlation primitives plus VPIN/OI divergence features with low train-window correlation to existing REX/funding/premium alpha components.
feature_examples: a_ret_z_12 <= train q0.45 with early-session gate
known_failures: Standalone low-correlation scans did not reach CAGR/strict_MDD >= 3 across train/test/eval/ytd.
Best standalone candidate has train ratio 0.48, test2024 2.48, eval2025 1.18, ytd2026 3.06.
entries.evidence: Low-corr scans found 128 candidate source features; best weak Alpha101 early-pullback long max corr to existing alpha components was 0.116 with positive 2024/2025/2026 but below ratio target.
entries.leakage_notes: Feature construction is causal/past-only by code inspection: rolling/zscore/rank/correlation use past windows; a_day_gap maps previous daily close via shift(1); thresholds are train quantiles; low-corr filter uses train rows only. Candidate ranking is diagnostic because OOS columns were inspected.
entries.tier_rationale: Alpha feature, not promoted alpha: the family is low-correlation and sometimes OOS-positive, but standalone risk-adjusted performance is below target.
entries.next_action: Use these tokens as gates/context for existing stronger sleeves; avoid standalone live execution until a predeclared rolling validation clears target ratio.

generation_recipe.protocol: train-only low-correlation filter and train-only quantile thresholds; strict path MDD; full-window CAGR
generation_recipe.notes: Prioritize semantic tokens EARLY_PULLBACK_LOW_ACTIVITY, RET_VOL_DECORRELATION, ORDERFLOW_TOXICITY, OI_PRICE_DIVERGENCE.
